headline: Goldman Sachs Raises Edison International (EIX) Price Target to $77
summary: Edison International (NYSE:EIX) is among the 11 Most Undervalued Utility Stocks to Buy Now. On February 26, Goldman Sachs raised the firm’s price target on Edison International (NYSE:EIX) to $77 from $64 and maintained a Neutral rating on the shares. This quarter, Edison International extended its 5%-7% EPS compound annual growth rate target through 2030, […]
